session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. This is a documentation-only change so we mainly need to check markdown formatting passes.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` to check the documentation changes.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast CI checks for documentation formatting
